code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> New
    state New {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Incomplete
        Incomplete --> DataComplete : FormSubmission
    }
    New --> InReview
    state InReview {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> AwaitingLegalReview
        AwaitingLegalReview --> AwaitingResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingResponse --> AwaitingLegalReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingLegalReview --> OutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_if_state <<choice>>
        OutcomeProvided --> legal_if_state
        legal_if_state --> LegalApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_if_state --> LegalRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        LegalApproved --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        LegalRejected --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        --
        [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> AwaitingIPScan
        AwaitingIPScan --> IpScanComplete
        state ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpScanComplete --> ip_if_state
        ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if ScanOutcome == no_findings
        ip_if_state --> AwaitingIpReview: if ScanOutcome == inconclusive
        ip_if_state --> IpRejected: if ScanOutcome == findings
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIpResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingIpResponse --> AwaitingIpReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingIpReview --> IpOutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpOutcomeProvided --> legal_ip_if_state
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpApproved --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        IpApproved --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        --
        [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> AwaitingSecurityScan
        AwaitingSecurityScan --> SecurityScanComplete
        state security_if_state <<choice>>
        SecurityScanComplete --> security_if_state
        security_if_state --> SecurityApproved: if no_findings
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if inconclusive
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if security findings
        SecurityApproved --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityRejected --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityApproved --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        SecurityRejected --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    }
    state inreview_if_state <<choice>>
    InReview --> inreview_if_state
    inreview_if_state --> Rejected: One or more check failed
    inreview_if_state --> Approved: All checks pass
    Approved --> NonCompliant: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance
    NonCompliant --> Retired: Noncompliance not mitigated
    NonCompliant --> Approved: Compliance issue resolved
    Approved --> Retired: Repository no longer required
    Rejected --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    Retired --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
repo_description: This tool allows an organization to manage users, and their association to a public GitHub, and a private GitHub enterprise (for InnerSource.)
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech诊断引擎设计一个完整的状态流转图。核心流程是：新提交的组件先经过数据完整性检查，然后进入InReview状态，在InReview里要并行跑三套检查——法务审查、IP扫描和安全扫描。
明白。我注意到法务审查这块有个特殊逻辑：如果法务提出疑问，需要进入AwaitingResponse等待回复，然后再回到AwaitingLegalReview。最终法务给出结果后，要用一个choice节点来判断是LegalApproved还是LegalRejected，对吗？
对，而且LegalApproved要指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，LegalRejected要回到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault重新处理。IP扫描那边更复杂一些，扫描完成后有三种可能：无发现直接批准、有发现直接拒绝、结果存疑需要人工复核。
好的，我先画出IP扫描的主分支。对于AwaitingIpReview这个复核状态，它和法务审查类似，也有提问-回复的循环，最后通过legal_ip_if_state判断结果。另外我注意到复核状态、拒绝状态和批准状态都可以通过"Dependencies modified"回到AwaitingIPScan重新扫描。
IP审查的最终结果，无论是IpApproved还是IpRejected，都要流向HealthTech_EMR_Sync。接下来是第三套检查——安全扫描，从HealthTech_LabAnalyzer进入AwaitingSecurityScan。

安全扫描这边我画了一个security_if_state的choice节点，分支是无发现批准、存疑拒绝、有发现拒绝。但这里有个细节想确认：SecurityApproved和SecurityRejected都可以通过"Code updates identified"回到AwaitingSecurityScan重新扫描，最终SecurityApproved到HealthTech_PatientRecords，SecurityRejected回到HealthTech_LabAnalyzer？
没错。现在来看InReview的整体出口：三套检查都完成后，用inreview_if_state判断，任一检查失败就Rejected，全部通过就Approved。Approved之后还有个合规监控状态——如果定期扫描发现不合规，进入NonCompliant，可以修复后回到Approved，也可以最终Retired。
我画完了整体结构。Rejected指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，Retired回到HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。还有Approved也可以直接Retired，表示仓库不再使用。
等等，我刚才漏了一个细节。AwaitingIpReview那里，如果依赖被修改，是可以回到AwaitingIPScan的，但IpRejected和IpApproved也应该有同样的回退路径。你检查一下是不是漏了这两条线？
确实漏了，我补上了。现在IpRejected和IpApproved也都有"Dependencies modified"回到AwaitingIPScan的转移。另外确认一下，表单提交触发从Incomplete到DataComplete的转移，这个FormSubmission事件已经标注。
完美，这就是我们要的状态图。所有关键系统——DiagnosticEngine、HIPAA_Vault、LabAnalyzer、EMR_Sync、PatientRecords都串联起来了，合规生命周期也完整覆盖。
